title: Running Total Per Customer
description: Calculate the cumulative order amount for each customer based on order date.
sql_solution: SELECT customer_id, date, SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY date) running_total FROM orders;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

running_window = (
    Window.partitionBy("customer_id")
    .orderBy(to_date(col("date")))
    .rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow)
)

result = (
    orders.withColumn("running_total", sum("amount").over(running_window))
    .select("customer_id", "date", "running_total")
)
